description_text: Item Description: This listing is for 4 pieces (2 L & 2 R) 100% Brand New & High Quality Front Bumper Canards Splitters. Made of high quality ABS plastic with UV-Resistant epoxy coating for a long-lasting result. Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. Come with self-adhesive tape for easy, simple installation. Technical parameter: Conditions: New Quantity: 4 pieces (2 L and 2 R) Color: Carbon fiber Installation: Simply clean the bumper and remove any dirt or leftover water. Peel off the double-sided tape, and stick on the bumper. Allow the tape to adhere onto the surface and use the screws to permanently secure the bumper. Professional installation is highly recommended
